description: Cross-language lightweight SDK entrypoints for consuming and parsing /v1/events/stream Server-Sent Events without importing the full platform client.
principles: Expose live task, workflow, approval, and runtime event streams as a focused SDK slice for external pages, plugins, CLIs, and sidecars.
Keep SSE stream URL construction and frame parsing directly callable without coupling callers to generated SDK internals.
Make Events access available through Agent Kit for one-stop lightweight observability workflows.

capabilities.name: stream
capabilities.description: Connect to the authenticated SSE event stream.

capabilities.name: parse
capabilities.description: Parse SSE frames into event messages for tests, CLIs, and adapters.
